name: code-research
description: Run two read-only code research tasks in parallel and collect focused repository notes.

tasks.task: Research the /flow command surface in this repository. Identify the extension entrypoint, registered commands, and the files that implement command formatting. Do not modify files.
tasks.outputContract: Return a concise Markdown summary with file paths and the command list.

tasks.task: Research how flow run artifacts are created and updated. Identify where run.json, compiled.json, task logs, and index.json are written. Do not modify files.
tasks.outputContract: Return a concise Markdown summary with file paths and artifact responsibilities.
